steps.t: Sigileth is in Nothgar, the tower located within the camp of Thangúlhad. Bori has remembered something that may be useful: a secret way into Dol Guldu…
Ningloril is in Thangúlhad. You have discovered the secret way used by Mithrandir to enter Dol Guldur long ago and should report now to Ningloril.
